tools.name: create_app
tools.description: Create a new application from a natural language prompt. The AI generates a complete web app with pages, components, styling, and data models. Returns a job_id - poll get_job_status to track progress. When the job is done, the app is ready.

tools.name: agency_create_client
tools.description: Agency mode only. Create or update a client record for an account-level agent. This does not create a verified Fine Structure user account and does not transfer ownership.

tools.name: agency_list_clients
tools.description: Agency mode only. List client records and app handoff status for the authenticated agent.

tools.name: agency_create_client_app
tools.description: Agency mode only. Create a new app owned by the agent, start generation, and create a claim link for the client. Ownership transfers only when the invited client logs in with the same email and accepts the claim link.

tools.name: agency_create_claim_link
tools.description: Agency mode only. Create a client claim link for an existing app owned by the agent. The client must log in with the invited email before ownership transfers.

tools.name: agency_get_claim_status
tools.description: Agency mode only. Inspect one handoff status without exposing the raw claim token.

tools.name: update_app
tools.description: Update an existing application with a new prompt. The AI modifies the app based on your instructions. Creates a Saved Version before the update. Returns a job_id - poll get_job_status to track progress.

tools.name: publish_app
tools.description: Publish an app - freeze current state and make it live at a URL. Also configures whether the public URL is open, app-login gated, private, or inferred from the app.

tools.name: get_platform_guide
tools.description: Return a machine-readable Fine Structure / FSe2 guide for AI agents. Call this at the start of an MCP session to learn app files, entities, safe edit workflows, validation, publishing, A/B testing, secrets, and platform rules.

tools.name: get_recommended_workflow
tools.description: Return the recommended MCP tool sequence for a task type. Use this before creating apps, editing files, seeding data, publishing, setting up A/B tests, restoring versions, or configuring secrets/integrations.

tools.name: get_job_status
tools.description: Poll the status of an async generation job. Use this after create_app or update_app to know when the job is done. Returns status ('running' or 'done'), progress events, and result summary when complete.

tools.name: get_app_status
tools.description: Get app overview: files, published state, URL, active jobs.

tools.name: get_app_links
tools.description: Return editor, preview, published path, subdomain, and custom-domain links plus whether each works for anonymous visitors, app users, or Studio users based on publish and auth settings.

tools.name: list_app_domains
tools.description: List an app's platform path, subdomain, and configured custom domain with verification, SSL, primary-domain, redirect, publish, and login-gating status.

tools.name: add_custom_domain
tools.description: Attach or replace the app custom domain through the same Fine Structure Studio custom-domain flow. Returns exact DNS verification and routing records for the user to configure at their DNS provider.

tools.name: get_domain_verification
tools.description: Return the exact DNS records and instructions required to verify and route the app custom domain.

tools.name: check_domain_verification
tools.description: Check Fine Structure custom-domain verification and SSL status for the configured custom domain, then save the latest status.

tools.name: set_primary_domain
tools.description: Set which app host should be treated as primary for generated links and custom-domain redirects.

tools.name: remove_custom_domain
tools.description: Remove the configured custom domain from the app and clean up the platform-side hostname registration when possible.

tools.name: get_domain_ssl_status
tools.description: Return SSL/certificate status and pending certificate validation DNS records for the app custom domain.

tools.name: configure_domain_redirects
tools.description: Configure custom-domain redirect policy: primary domain, optional www/root redirect, and HTTPS enforcement.

tools.name: list_apps
tools.description: List all applications owned by the authenticated user.

tools.name: get_app_files
tools.description: Get the file tree for an app with paths and byte sizes.

tools.name: read_app_file
tools.description: Read one source file from an app's virtual filesystem.

tools.name: read_app_files
tools.description: Read several source files from an app's virtual filesystem.

tools.name: write_app_file
tools.description: Create or replace one file in an app's virtual filesystem. Creates a Saved Version before changing content.

tools.name: patch_app_file
tools.description: Patch one file by replacing exact text. Safer than full overwrite for targeted edits. Creates a Saved Version before changing content.

tools.name: rename_app_file
tools.description: Rename or move one app source file atomically. Internally stages an upsert at new_path and a delete at old_path, validates the resulting app state, and creates a Saved Version before applying.

tools.name: get_app_detail
tools.description: Deep introspection of an app: entities, pages, settings, integrations, environment variables, and file structure. Use this to understand what an app contains before updating it.

tools.name: get_entities
tools.description: Get all entity (data model) schemas for an app, with record counts. Each entity has fields, types, and relationships.

tools.name: query_entity
tools.description: Query app data records for one entity with optional exact-match filters.

tools.name: seed_entity
tools.description: Seed records into one app entity. Useful during EDIT when new screens need sample data. Creates a Saved Version before inserting records.

tools.name: update_entity_record
tools.description: Update one app entity record by ID. Creates a Saved Version before the update.

tools.name: get_pages
tools.description: Get all pages in an app with their file paths and sizes.

tools.name: get_errors
tools.description: Get recent runtime errors for an app (last 20). Useful for diagnosing issues before updating.

tools.name: get_preview_url
tools.description: Return editor preview and published/public URLs for an app.

tools.name: list_saved_versions
tools.description: List restorable Saved Versions for an app, including versions created by MCP writes.

tools.name: restore_saved_version
tools.description: Restore an app to a Saved Version. Requires versions:write scope and confirm=true. This restores files, records, app settings, and A/B test state captured in the snapshot.

tools.name: create_change_set
tools.description: Create a staged file change set. Add multiple file changes, validate them as one app state, then apply atomically.

tools.name: add_file_change
tools.description: Stage one file upsert or delete inside a change set. Does not modify the live app until apply_change_set.

tools.name: validate_change_set
tools.description: Validate current app files plus staged change set files before applying.

tools.name: apply_change_set
tools.description: Apply a staged change set to the app. Creates a Saved Version before applying. Blocks on validation errors unless force=true.

tools.name: discard_change_set
tools.description: Discard a pending staged change set without changing app files.

tools.name: validate_app
tools.description: Run deterministic app checks: syntax, imports, routes/pages, entity schemas, missing entities, and recorded runtime errors.

tools.name: inspect_preview
tools.description: Return server-side preview context: URLs, persisted runtime/network errors, static clickable candidates, pages, and explicit live-browser availability.

tools.name: get_app_security_context
tools.description: Return safe security context for one owned app: owner id/email, Studio collaborators, generated-app members, route policies, entity policies, and recent security audit entries. Does not return secrets and does not grant access to other apps.

tools.name: set_route_policy
tools.description: Create or update a server-owned route policy for a generated app route.

tools.name: set_entity_policy
tools.description: Create or update server-side read/write role policy for an app entity.

tools.name: list_app_members
tools.description: List generated-app runtime users/members for an app. This is separate from Studio project collaborators.

tools.name: invite_app_member
tools.description: Provision a generated-app runtime member with a role. This does not create a Studio collaborator. The owner role cannot be assigned. If password is omitted, a temporary password is generated and returned once.

tools.name: update_app_member_role
tools.description: Update a generated-app runtime member role. This cannot assign owner and cannot change the Fine Structure account owner.

tools.name: remove_app_member
tools.description: Remove a generated-app runtime member.

tools.name: get_app_security_audit
tools.description: Read recent server-side security audit events for an app.

tools.name: compare_saved_versions
tools.description: Compare two Saved Versions and return per-file additions, removals, modifications, and compact diffs.

tools.name: compare_current_to_version
tools.description: Compare the current app files to a Saved Version and return compact per-file diffs.

tools.name: restore_file_from_version
tools.description: Restore one file from a Saved Version instead of restoring the entire app. Creates a Saved Version before changing the file.

tools.name: create_entity_schema
tools.description: Create an entity schema file in entities/<Entity>.json. Creates a Saved Version before writing.

tools.name: update_entity_schema
tools.description: Replace or shallow-merge an existing entity schema file. Creates a Saved Version before writing.

tools.name: validate_entity_relationships
tools.description: Validate entity relationship metadata and *_id references against existing entity schemas.

tools.name: update_entity_metadata
tools.description: Set relationship/index metadata on an entity schema. This stores metadata in the schema file; DB index creation is automatic where supported by the platform.

tools.name: list_secret_keys
tools.description: List secret key names for an app. Secret values are never returned.

tools.name: set_secret
tools.description: Create or update one encrypted app secret. The secret value is never returned.

tools.name: delete_secret
tools.description: Delete one app secret by key.

tools.name: list_integrations
tools.description: List supported integrations and safe connected integration metadata for an app. Tokens/secrets are never returned.

tools.name: configure_integration
tools.description: Store safe non-secret integration metadata for an app. Use set_secret for API keys/tokens.

tools.name: list_ab_tests
tools.description: List the platform A/B tests configured for an app.

tools.name: create_ab_test
tools.description: Create a native Fine Structure A/B test between existing app pages. Use update_app first if a variant page still needs to be generated. Creates a Saved Version before the change.

tools.name: update_ab_test
tools.description: Update a native A/B test, including active state, variants, traffic, and conversion goal. Creates a Saved Version before the change.

tools.name: delete_ab_test
tools.description: Delete a native A/B test from an app. Creates a Saved Version before the change.

tools.name: get_ab_test_stats
tools.description: Get views, unique visitors, conversions, and conversion rates for an A/B test.

tools.name: email_marketing_status
tools.description: Admin only. Inspect the isolated Email Marketing module: enabled state, sender settings, templates, sequences, variable triggers, and recent campaign status.

tools.name: email_marketing_configure_sender
tools.description: Admin only. Configure global Email Marketing sender details and module enabled state. Unsubscribe footer remains mandatory.

tools.name: email_marketing_update_template
tools.description: Admin only. Update an automatic Email Marketing template, such as user_joined welcome email. The unsubscribe block is still appended by the server.

tools.name: email_marketing_create_broadcast
tools.description: Admin only. Create a filtered broadcast campaign, optionally scheduled or sent now.

tools.name: email_marketing_create_sequence
tools.description: Admin only. Create a scheduled email sequence using fixed dates or day offsets. Each generated email keeps mandatory unsubscribe.

tools.name: email_marketing_create_variable_trigger
tools.description: Admin only. Create an email rule that sends when a named variable changes from one value to another. Empty from_value/to_value acts as wildcard.

tools.name: email_marketing_trigger_variable
tools.description: Admin only. Manually fire variable-transition email rules for one user. Useful for MCP/agent workflows and tests.

tools.name: email_marketing_app_status
tools.description: Inspect app-scoped Email Marketing for one generated app: settings, contacts, campaigns, event triggers, and recent events.

tools.name: email_marketing_app_configure
tools.description: Configure isolated Email Marketing settings for a generated app. Can be used by Studio/chat agents.

tools.name: email_marketing_app_sync_contacts
tools.description: Sync an app entity table into app-scoped Email Marketing contacts. Records without a valid email are skipped.

tools.name: email_marketing_app_create_broadcast
tools.description: Create an app-scoped broadcast to contacts synced from that generated app, optionally scheduled or sent now.

tools.name: email_marketing_app_create_event_trigger
tools.description: Create an app-scoped email rule that sends when an app event is recorded, for example entity_created or Customer.created.

tools.name: email_marketing_app_record_event
tools.description: Record an app event and send matching app-scoped Email Marketing triggers.

tools.name: email_marketing_app_create_workflow
tools.description: Create an app-scoped automation workflow with email, wait, condition, split, and goal steps.

tools.name: email_marketing_app_create_sequence
tools.description: Create an app-scoped email sequence using fixed dates or day offsets between emails.

tools.name: email_marketing_app_report
tools.description: Read app-scoped Email Marketing reporting: delivery counts, open/click rates, and recent tracking events.

tools.name: email_marketing_app_create_segment
tools.description: Create an app-scoped saved audience segment using field, tag, and behavior filters.

tools.name: email_marketing_app_contact_profile
tools.description: Read a contact profile with email delivery, tracking, app-event, workflow, suppression, and unsubscribe timeline.

tools.name: email_marketing_app_deliverability
tools.description: Read provider readiness, bounce/complaint rates, suppression reasons, and recent deliverability risk events.

tools.name: email_marketing_app_process_queue
tools.description: Process due app-scoped automation workflow runs and email queue jobs with locks, retries, and suppression checks.

tools.name: email_marketing_app_queue_status
tools.description: Inspect app-scoped Email Marketing queue jobs and per-status counts.

tools.name: email_marketing_app_suppress_contact
tools.description: Suppress an app contact email after a bounce, complaint, manual block, provider block, or unsubscribe.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: publish_app, get_app_status, get_errors, get_preview_url, get_app_security_context, email_marketing_app_report, email_marketing_app_contact_profile, email_marketing_app_deliverability · Private data: agency_create_client, agency_list_clients, agency_get_claim_status, publish_app, get_platform_guide, get_recommended_workflow, get_app_status, add_custom_domain, get_domain_verification, get_domain_ssl_status, get_app_files, read_app_file, read_app_files, write_app_file, patch_app_file, rename_app_file, get_app_detail, get_entities, query_entity, seed_entity, update_entity_record, get_pages, restore_saved_version, create_change_set, add_file_change, validate_change_set, discard_change_set, get_app_security_context, invite_app_member, compare_saved_versions, compare_current_to_version, restore_file_from_version, create_entity_schema, update_entity_schema, update_entity_metadata, list_secret_keys, set_secret, delete_secret, list_integrations, configure_integration, email_marketing_app_status, email_marketing_app_sync_contacts, email_marketing_app_create_broadcast, email_marketing_app_record_event, email_marketing_app_contact_profile, email_marketing_app_suppress_contact · Public sink: agency_create_client_app, agency_create_claim_link, publish_app, get_app_links, list_app_domains, get_app_security_context, email_marketing_status, email_marketing_configure_sender, email_marketing_update_template, email_marketing_create_broadcast, email_marketing_create_sequence, email_marketing_create_variable_trigger, email_marketing_trigger_variable, email_marketing_app_status, email_marketing_app_configure, email_marketing_app_sync_contacts, email_marketing_app_create_broadcast, email_marketing_app_create_event_trigger, email_marketing_app_record_event, email_marketing_app_create_workflow, email_marketing_app_create_sequence, email_marketing_app_report, email_marketing_app_create_segment, email_marketing_app_contact_profile, email_marketing_app_deliverability, email_marketing_app_process_queue, email_marketing_app_queue_status, email_marketing_app_suppress_contact · Destructive: remove_custom_domain, patch_app_file, rename_app_file, add_file_change, validate_app, remove_app_member, delete_secret, delete_ab_test.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: publish_app, get_app_status, get_errors, get_preview_url, get_app_security_context, email_marketing_app_report, email_marketing_app_contact_profile, email_marketing_app_deliverability · Private data: agency_create_client, agency_list_clients, agency_get_claim_status, publish_app, get_platform_guide, get_recommended_workflow, get_app_status, add_custom_domain, get_domain_verification, get_domain_ssl_status, get_app_files, read_app_file, read_app_files, write_app_file, patch_app_file, rename_app_file, get_app_detail, get_entities, query_entity, seed_entity, update_entity_record, get_pages, restore_saved_version, create_change_set, add_file_change, validate_change_set, discard_change_set, get_app_security_context, invite_app_member, compare_saved_versions, compare_current_to_version, restore_file_from_version, create_entity_schema, update_entity_schema, update_entity_metadata, list_secret_keys, set_secret, delete_secret, list_integrations, configure_integration, email_marketing_app_status, email_marketing_app_sync_contacts, email_marketing_app_create_broadcast, email_marketing_app_record_event, email_marketing_app_contact_profile, email_marketing_app_suppress_contact · Public sink: agency_create_client_app, agency_create_claim_link, publish_app, get_app_links, list_app_domains, get_app_security_context, email_marketing_status, email_marketing_configure_sender, email_marketing_update_template, email_marketing_create_broadcast, email_marketing_create_sequence, email_marketing_create_variable_trigger, email_marketing_trigger_variable, email_marketing_app_status, email_marketing_app_configure, email_marketing_app_sync_contacts, email_marketing_app_create_broadcast, email_marketing_app_create_event_trigger, email_marketing_app_record_event, email_marketing_app_create_workflow, email_marketing_app_create_sequence, email_marketing_app_report, email_marketing_app_create_segment, email_marketing_app_contact_profile, email_marketing_app_deliverability, email_marketing_app_process_queue, email_marketing_app_queue_status, email_marketing_app_suppress_contact · Destructive: remove_custom_domain, patch_app_file, rename_app_file, add_file_change, validate_app, remove_app_member, delete_secret, delete_ab_test

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
